title: callitriche trochlearis
intro: Callitriche trochlearis, also known as round-leaved mudwort, is a species of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Callitriche trochlearis include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal properties, and it is also used in herbal remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
